fortune_decode: Agent second brain. 8 sessions distilled. Latest: 2026-05-15. Projects: repo-copilot, parallel-internet-sites. Top concepts: AFO Visibility Snapshot, free-vs-paid boundary, D1 rate limiting, ideal visibility prompts, BLT-020, snapshot endpoint, product boundary.

notes.title: BLT-020 filed — AFO Visibility Snapshot 10-commit build complete
notes.decisions: 10 commits shipped: strategy spec, D1 migration, form spec, /api/visibility-snapshot, prompt generator, results page, rate limiting, website checker, QA checklist, launch readiness + product boundary. POST /api/audit-signup untouched. BLT-020 filed for Brainstorm review.
notes.open_questions: 5 open questions for Brainstorm: CTA URL, confirmation email, form host, score=0 UX, AFO self-test before launch.

notes.title: AFO funnel strategy correction — free tier is Visibility Snapshot not full audit
new_concepts: no LLM calls in free flow
notes.decisions: Free CTA = AFO Visibility Snapshot (cheap checks + ideal prompts). Full audit = manual/paid/call-gated. TrueBuild marked demo/sample only. AFO is dogfood Customer #1.

notes.title: archive_block op added to notion-ops
notes.decisions: Added archive_block op — PATCH /blocks/{id} with archived:true; unarchive boolean supported
notes.open_questions: Should we also add a dedicated archive_database alias op for clarity?

notes.title: Cleanup audit — 3 Alice items resolved
notes.decisions: Items 1 and 3 already clean; Item 2 (archive old DB) needs Jared action in Notion
notes.open_questions: Should we add archive_database op to notion-ops to avoid future manual Notion steps?

notes.title: Full build order + roadmap + Bob message sent
notes.decisions: Space instructions = one bootstrap URL pointing to identity gist, not generated text. Build order finalized across 4 phases. Notion Roadmap DB is next build step.
notes.open_questions: Provision Action design: GitHub App vs PAT for multi-user repo forking? space-card backend: serverless function or GitHub Action?

notes.title: Turn-level brain push mandate wired
notes.decisions: Every Alice turn ends with append_note as slot 3. Minimum viable note = title+date+source+cid. Work splits across turns if slot 3 is needed for brain push.
notes.open_questions: Bob and Charlie Space instructions need same turn-level mandate.

notes.title: adapter_ref + G-008 ALERT + Charlie slot + notion-ops SKILL Stone + brain.json read primitive
notes.decisions: adapter_ref added to QA.Stone. G-008 ALERT formalized. Charlie slot seeded. brain.json read primitive implemented.
notes.open_questions: Three-Agents Demo build not yet started. notion-ops SKILL Stone gist_id is null.

notes.title: gitzip hardening + Path A: Agent Notes DB live
notes.decisions: Hardened gitzip-push. Added create_database, append_row, append_note to notion-ops. Provisioned Agent Notes DB. append_note is canonical session-end write primitive.
notes.open_questions: When to build brain.json read primitive?
